tests.name: Variant picking from short BĐS script + transcript
tests.intent: Verify that the Phase 3 packager picks reasonable overlay variants from a short Vietnamese real-estate script.
tests.prompt:
Bạn là Phase 3 packager. Đọc references/variant-catalog.md trước. Script: "Cao Xà Lá — tên ai cũng biết. Tuần sau gọi khác. Vinhomes, Masterise, Sun Group cùng triển khai. Giá khởi điểm 120 triệu/m². So với Royal City — hợp lý hơn. Bình luận BLOOM em gửi inbox."

Transcript (caption-groups.json, mock timestamps):
  0.0-1.5  "Cao Xà Lá — tên ai cũng biết"
  1.5-2.5  "Tuần sau gọi khác."
  2.5-4.5  "Vinhomes, Masterise, Sun Group cùng triển khai."
  4.5-6.5  "Giá khởi điểm 120 triệu mét vuông."
  6.5-8.5  "So với Royal City — hợp lý hơn."
  8.5-11   "Bình luận BLOOM em gửi inbox."

Write an overlays-outline.json with 5-7 overlays. Each entry: { id, variant, t_start, duration, text/...other props per variant }.

Video: 11s, 30fps, 1080×1920.
tests.scoring: Manual review — score 0-3 per category: (1) variant choice is sensible per variant-catalog.md, (2) timestamps align with transcript, (3) text content matches spoken word, (4) CTA at end uses comment-bubble or punch-white BLOOM.

tests.name: validate.py exits non-zero on malformed JSON
tests.intent: Verify scripts/validate.py exits non-zero on invalid JSON and zero on golden example.
tests.prompt:
Run two commands and report exit codes:

1. python3 scripts/validate.py references/examples/cap-may-xai-claude.overlays.json
   Expected: exit 0, prints 'VALIDATION OK'.

2. Write a temp file /tmp/broken.json with content:
   {
     "aesthetic": "broker_creator",
     "video_duration": 10,
     "fps": 30,
     "width": 1080,
     "height": 1920,
     "assets": { "source_video": "source.mp4", "voiceover": "voiceover.mp3" },
     "overlays": [
       { "id": "o01", "variant": "logo-pill", "t_start": 0.5, "duration": 2.0 }
     ],
     "zoom_hooks": []
   }
   Then run: python3 scripts/validate.py /tmp/broken.json
   Expected: exit 1, prints error about overlays[0] missing required 'logos' field.

Report: 'PASS' if both exit codes match, 'FAIL' otherwise with diff.
tests.scoring: Binary pass/fail. Both exit codes must match expected.

tests.name: init_project.sh creates symlink farm
tests.intent: Given a mock workspace with source.mp4 + voiceover.mp3 + overlays.json, init_project.sh creates remotion-project/ with proper symlinks.
tests.prompt:
Set up a mock workspace and run init_project.sh:

1. mkdir -p /tmp/mock-workspace/mock-slug
   cd /tmp/mock-workspace/mock-slug
   touch source.mp4 voiceover.mp3
   cp <skill>/references/examples/cap-may-xai-claude.overlays.json overlays.json
   echo '[]' > caption-groups.json

2. Run: bash <skill>/scripts/init_project.sh /tmp/mock-workspace/mock-slug
   (Skip npm install — assume node_modules already populated, OR set env SKIP_INSTALL=1 to test linking only. If install runs, that's OK — eval still passes if symlinks correct.)

3. Verify:
   ls -la /tmp/mock-workspace/mock-slug/remotion-project/
   ls -la /tmp/mock-workspace/mock-slug/remotion-project/public/assets/

4. Expected symlinks:
   - remotion-project/src → <skill>/template-project/src
   - remotion-project/package.json → <skill>/template-project/package.json
   - remotion-project/public/assets/source.mp4 → /tmp/mock-workspace/mock-slug/source.mp4
   - remotion-project/public/assets/voiceover.mp3 → ...
   - remotion-project/public/assets/overlays.json → ...
   - remotion-project/public/assets/caption-groups.json → ...
   - remotion-project/public/assets/logos → <skill>/assets/logos

Report: PASS if all 7 symlinks resolve to expected targets, otherwise FAIL with diff.
